old_title: Andy Burnham set to become UK's seventh prime minister in a decade
new_title: Updates: Andy Burnham becomes UK PM, vows to focus on cost-of-living crisis
old_text:
Live updates,
LIVE: Andy Burnham to become UK PM, deliver first speech at 10 Downing
The new leader takes over from Keir Starmer just two years after the outgoing PM led Labour to a landslide election victory.
new_text:
Updates: Andy Burnham becomes UK PM, vows to focus on cost-of-living crisis
The new leader takes over from Keir Starmer just two years after the outgoing PM led Labour to a landslide election victory.
